understanding.goal_understanding: Advance through each KA59 level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; once a level reports WIN, continue until the final level is completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempt to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in that direction; if blocked by walls/boundaries or immovable obstacles the piece does not move, while some adjacent objects may be pushable and can be pushed along when moving into them. Levels may have multiple selectable pieces; control switches via CLICK on a selectable’s exact pixel position as listed in the state (same coordinate system as player.position/objects). The movement_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency and do not guarantee success/failure, so trying moves is needed to learn wall/obstacle behavior.
